MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRYKOWSKI, DAVID SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-25-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON AUG-20-2003 IN DEPT. 218 - SETT. CONF. HELD ON WED., 20AUG2003, 2:00PM, D-525/504-B/206; THE CAUSE SETTLES; TERMS PLACED ON THE RECORD IN D-206; EDWARD A. NAGY, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLNTF.; DEFENDANT BRIAN KESSELRING APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA; DEF. AGREES WITH PLNTF. TO WAIVE ANY CLAIM OR CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST THE OTHER PARTY; DEFENDANT AGREES TO VACATE PREMISES AT 860 CORBETT AVE., #102, S.F., CA 94131 BY 11:59PM ON SUNDAY, OCTOBER 5, 2003 & WILL HAVE UNTIL 12:00 P.M. (NOON)ON MONDAY, OCTOBER 6, 2003 TO BE OUT OF THE PROPERTY, AS AGREED. PLNTF., IF DEFENDANT VACATES ON TIME, WILL THEN FILE A DISMISSAL IN THE ACTION. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE AN EX PARTE DECLARATION NAMING DEFENDANT BRIAN KESSELRING AND ALL OTHERS; JUDGMENT WILL ISSUE IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,805.00; NO COSTS; NO ATTORNEY FEES. ENFORCEMENT AS A JUDGMENT AS PER SECTION 664 P.C. ON THE RECORD, BOTH PLNTF DAVID STRYKOWSKI AND DEFENDANT BRIAN KESSELRING INFORM THE COURT THEY BOTH UNDERSTAND AND AGREE TO TERMS & CONDITIONS OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT THIS DAY. JUDGE: JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM B. PEAVEY, JR.; REPORTER: PATTY VAN STEENBERGE, CSR, D-206; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (WED., 20AUG2003, D-525/D504-B/D-206).
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-25-2003 - MATTER SETTLED AT SETT CONF.
